notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Carlos Narváez out at 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin grounds into a double play, shortstop Carlos Correa to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Caleb Durbin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Correa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Carlos Correa out at 1st.
